name: Improper Neutralization of Wildcards or Matching Symbols
description: The product does not properly neutralize wildcard or matching symbols (*, ?, [], regex metacharacters) in user input, allowing attackers to expand file globs, match unintended patterns, or cause excessive resource consumption through pathological regex patterns.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user-controlled data containing wildcard or regex metacharacters that flows to TRANSFORM[pattern_match] or STORAGE[file_glob] without a TRANSFORM[wildcard_escape] that escapes or quotes the matching symbols before they reach the pattern engine
